/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.11.11", "profile_name": "nyc_taxi", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.nyc_taxi.stg_invalid_trips"} */

  create or replace view
    "hive"."mart"."stg_invalid_trips"
  security definer
  as
    -- Staging: clean invalid records with their error reasons.


with src as (
  select
    cast(vendor_id as integer)                            as vendor_id,
    cast(pickup_ts as timestamp)                          as pickup_ts,
    cast(dropoff_ts as timestamp)                         as dropoff_ts,
    cast(passenger_count as integer)                      as passenger_count,
    cast(trip_distance as double)                        as trip_distance,
    cast(fare_amount as double)                           as fare_amount,
    cast(total_amount as double)                          as total_amount,
    pickup_borough,
    pickup_zone,
    validation_errors,
    cast(quarantine_ts as timestamp)                      as quarantine_ts,
    cast(pickup_year as integer)                          as pickup_year,
    cast(pickup_month as integer)                         as pickup_month
  from hive.nyc.invalid_trips
)
select * from src

  create or replace view
    "hive"."mart"."stg_trips"
  security definer
  as
    -- Staging: clean column types and names from the raw silver parquet.


with src as (
  select
    cast(vendor_id as integer)                            as vendor_id,
    cast(pickup_ts as timestamp)                          as pickup_ts,
    cast(dropoff_ts as timestamp)                         as dropoff_ts,
    cast(passenger_count as integer)                      as passenger_count,
    cast(trip_distance as double)                        as trip_distance,
    cast(rate_code_id as integer)                         as rate_code_id,
    cast(pickup_location_id as integer)                   as pickup_location_id,
    cast(dropoff_location_id as integer)                  as dropoff_location_id,
    cast(payment_type as integer)                         as payment_type,
    cast(fare_amount as double)                           as fare_amount,
    cast(extra as double)                                 as extra,
    cast(mta_tax as double)                               as mta_tax,
    cast(tip_amount as double)                            as tip_amount,
    cast(tolls_amount as double)                          as tolls_amount,
    cast(improvement_surcharge as double)                 as improvement_surcharge,
    cast(total_amount as double)                          as total_amount,
    pickup_borough,
    pickup_zone,

    dropoff_borough,
    dropoff_zone,
    dropoff_service_zone,
    cast(pickup_year as integer)                          as pickup_year,
    cast(pickup_month as integer)                         as pickup_month
  from hive.nyc.trips
)
select * from src

adapter_response.query:
/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.11.11", "profile_name": "nyc_taxi", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.nyc_taxi.fact_invalid_trips"} */

  create or replace view
    "hive"."mart"."fact_invalid_trips"
  security definer
  as
    -- Mart: invalid trips fact, exploded for each error reason.

select
  quarantine_ts,
  cast(pickup_year as integer)    as pickup_year,
  cast(pickup_month as integer)   as pickup_month,
  err as validation_error,
  count(*) as error_count
from "hive"."mart"."stg_invalid_trips"
cross join unnest(validation_errors) as t(err)
group by 1, 2, 3, 4

group by 1, 2, 3, 4

from "hive"."mart"."fact_invalid_trips"
where validation_error is null

Database Error in model dim_zone (models/marts/dim_zone.sql)
  TrinoUserError(type=USER_ERROR, name=PERMISSION_DENIED, message="Access Denied: Cannot rename table from mart.dim_zone to mart.dim_zone__dbt_backup", query_id=20260604_110922_00158_ka6fd)
  compiled code at target/run/nyc_taxi/models/marts/dim_zone.sql
results.compiled_code:
-- Mart: zone dimension (pickup + dropoff union of distinct zones seen in trips).


with zones as (
  select pickup_zone as zone, pickup_borough as borough, pickup_service_zone as service_zone from "hive"."mart"."stg_trips"
  union
  select dropoff_zone as zone, dropoff_borough as borough, dropoff_service_zone as service_zone from "hive"."mart"."stg_trips"
)
select
  row_number() over (order by zone) as zone_sk,
  zone,
  any_value(borough)    as borough,
  any_value(service_zone) as service_zone
from zones
where zone is not null
group by zone
order by zone_sk

results.compiled_code:
-- Mart: fact_trips with derived duration and tip rate.


select
  pickup_ts,
  dropoff_ts,
  date_trunc('hour', pickup_ts)                        as pickup_hour_ts,
  date(pickup_ts)                                      as pickup_date,
  hour(pickup_ts)                                      as pickup_hour,
  day_of_week(pickup_ts)                               as pickup_dow,
  vendor_id,
  passenger_count,
  trip_distance,
  rate_code_id,
  payment_type,
  fare_amount,
  extra,
  mta_tax,
  tip_amount,
  tolls_amount,
  improvement_surcharge,
  total_amount,
  case when total_amount > 0 then tip_amount / total_amount end as tip_rate,
  date_diff('second', pickup_ts, dropoff_ts)           as trip_duration_sec,
  pickup_location_id,
  dropoff_location_id,
  pickup_zone,
  dropoff_zone,
  pickup_borough,
  dropoff_borough,
  pickup_service_zone,
  dropoff_service_zone,
  pickup_year,
  pickup_month
from "hive"."mart"."stg_trips"
